items.title: Raptors sophomore Collin Murray-Boyles is switching back to No. 30, his college number.
items.author: Wolstat
items.body_excerpt:
Raptors sophomore Collin Murray-Boyles is switching back to No. 30, his college number. 
Ochai Agbaji had it last year.
